source_description: Issue #25 — Faction-System (MVP). Phase 1 of Vertical Slice Epic #32. Foundation for #24 Printing House (edicts gated by standing) and future Acts 2-5. MVP: 3 factions (Council, Resistance, Independent), -100..+100 standing per faction in localStorage, public API (getStanding/adjustStanding/setStanding), 1-2 NPC greeting variants, 1 standing-gated mission as showcase. Out of scope: branching logic, faction-locked merchants, UI display, sub-factions.
